texto: A mission-minded family will serve together. Look for needs in your community and brainstorm with your spouse about how you can partner together to meet those needs in a way that works for you. My husband is handy, and I love to cook. My casserole dish and his tool box work well together. Is there a single mom who could use some help with yard work? Is there an elderly couple who needs help hanging their Christmas lights? Look for creative ways you can serve side by side and connect with each other and your neighbors.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lyli Dunbar que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “A mission-minded family will serve together. Look for needs in your community and brainstorm with…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, christianity, family, com foco em dia-chuvoso e casamento.
